description: You are a sustainability specialist tasked with modeling a passive cooling retrofit for the 4-storey commercial office building currently open in eQUEST. The retrofit involves exposing the concrete structure on the Top Floor to increase thermal mass. Update the 'FLOOR-WEIGHT' parameter for all Top Floor spaces (zones starting with 'T.': South, East, North, West, and Core) to 120 lb/ft². Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation to capture the impact and save the project.
